## **\[ssts vsl \- Hook 1 \- Control Rewrite (beginner angle)** {#[ssts-vsl---hook-1---control-rewrite-(beginner-angle)}

Here’s why 90% of contact tips never work for beginner golfers: 

It’s not about HOW you strike the ball… 

It’s WHERE you strike the ball. 

By making this simple change, you can start transforming your contact TODAY.

And if you do it…

I can practically guarantee your results and love for the game will improve for the better.

Just like the over 150,000 recreational golfers I’ve shared this with, too. 

So stick with me…

Because in this video…

I'm going to share the ONE thing you should NEVER do in your swing if you want to make flush, ball-first contact…  

The ONE simple technique that reduces your fat, thin, and mis-hit shots the fastest… 

And the secret to how beginner golfers ALL over the world are making crisp, ball-first contact over and over again — after just 10 shots or less on the range. 

So if right now you're struggling with an inconsistent golf swing…

Or poor contact on basic shots…

Or embarrassing fat shots or thin shots in front of your friends…

Or anxiety standing over the ball in front of complete strangers...

Or losing confidence because you aren't reaching your expectations fast enough…

Or especially if you've suffered from several or ALL of these things…

It is NOT your fault.

And I encourage you to listen closely for the next few minutes.

I'll explain everything…

And the simple 10-ball practice sequence I've used to help not just experienced players… 

But thousands of beginners who swear by this simple technique I’m about to share with you… right now.

Before I do… how do I even know it's so effective?

# **\[Lead \#1 (Gundry Swipe)\]** {#[lead-#1-(gundry-swipe)]}

## \[Hook 1\] {#[hook-1]}

Here’s why 90% of contact tips never work: 

It’s not about HOW you strike the ball… 

It’s WHERE you strike the ball. 

By making this simple change, you can start transforming your contact TODAY.

And if you do it…

I can practically guarantee your performance and love for the game will change for the better.

I did…

\[tease of tour striker golf school\]  
And I’ve since used it to help more than 150,000 amateurs make the best contact of THEIR lives too. 

So stick with me…

Because in this video…

I'm going to share the ONE thing you should NEVER do in your swing if you want to make ball-first contact…  

Which simple technique fixes your fat, thin, and mis-hit shots the fastest… 

And the secret to how amateur golfers ALL over the world are making ball-first contact consistently — in just 10 shots or less on the range. 

So if you've ever struggled with an inconsistent golf swing…

Or poor contact on basic shots…

Or losing distance as you age…

Or embarrassing fat shots or thin shots in front of your friends…

Or anxiety standing over the ball...

Or losing confidence because you aren't reaching your expectations…

Or especially if you've suffered from several or ALL of these things…

It is NOT your fault.

And I encourage you to listen closely for the next few minutes.

I'll explain everything…

And the simple 10-ball sequence I've used to help not just myself… 

But thousands of other golfers who swear by this simple technique I’m about to share with you… right now.

Before I do… how do I even know it's so effective?

# **\[ALL LEADS PICK UP HERE\]** {#[all-leads-pick-up-here]}

## \[Introduction \+ background story \+ big idea\] {#[introduction-+-background-story-+-big-idea]}

I'm Martin Chuck…

A Golf Digest Top 10 instructor… and I’ve had the privilege of sharing these exact secrets…

With literally 150,000 amateur golfers — just like you — all across the country.

And I’ve witnessed firsthand as they’ve made incredible transformations in their golf game — by ONLY changing this one thing.

Like most well-intentioned golfers… 

You’ve probably been misled towards traditional how-to “solutions" that give you little to no improvement.

You’ve tried hitting buckets of balls at the range...

Or taking lessons from random instructors...

Or even watching hours of YouTube videos to improve your contact, right?

Which only resulted in you getting MORE confused… MORE frustrated… and falling back into your old habits… 

Never making consistent contact on the course when you need it most.

And you’ve probably been convinced that you have to “change” or “tweak” your swing if you want to get better… 

But that never truly works, does it?

Because nobody has the time OR the drive… to put in ALL that effort…

Only to end up getting let down… when what you’re practicing DOESN’T translate onto the course.

It’s flat-out demoralizing.

Does that sound like you?

Well if it does… let’s put a stop to that.

Let’s jump into this simple technique and put you on the right path… right now.

And listen… you’re gonna want to write this down…

Because I guarantee if you implement this into your swing…

You’ll see a drastic change in your contact as early as today.

It’s THAT effective.

Are you ready?

Check this out. 

## \[Negative Hook Tease\] {#[negative-hook-tease]}

\[Show animation of swing circle to create intrigue and question: EXAMPLE VIDEO: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IC4hrrbZNftRPm0C1P2oPVkJtUa261MU5Jei\_R5-k9A/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IC4hrrbZNftRPm0C1P2oPVkJtUa261MU5Jei_R5-k9A/edit?usp=sharing)  
\]

What do you notice about WHERE the ball is hit on this swing circle?

It looks like the ball is about to be hit at the **LOWEST** point of the swing, right? 

Actually... that’s WRONG. 

And in a moment… you’ll see why this common misconception…

Is the REAL reason most amateurs can't make solid contact.

## \[False Solution Lies\] {#[false-solution-lies]}

I know… because I see the SAME problems at my golf camps… day in and day out.

Players trying REALLY hard to hit ball first… but digging the club in the ground BEHIND the ball causing fat shots. 

OR… putting ALL their concentration on keeping their head down in the swing…

Only to stand up early and skull it a few feet off the ground.

Or worse… focusing ALL their attention on just hitting the ball…

Only to shank it SO bad… they BARELY get the club on the ball at all… 

And NEVER get to experience the feeling of consistent flush contact. 

## \[False Solution Truth\] {#[false-solution-truth]}

So although everyone comes to me for a lesson to gain distance... fix their slice... or just consistently hit the ball better…

What they don’t realize… is that you can’t do ANY of those things…

Without FIRST knowing WHERE to strike the golf ball. 

Meaning… 

It’s not about knowing **HOW to strike the ball**… with swing thoughts, lessons, and hours of trying to figure out a new technique…  

It’s about **WHERE you strike the ball.** 

And I want you to get this… 

Because when you understand this ONE thing about your swing’s REAL low point… everything changes. 

## \[Negative Hook Setup\] {#[negative-hook-setup]}

Here’s why that is.

Has anyone ever shown you where the REAL bottom of the swing is?

Most golfers have NO clue. 

They think the low point is directly UNDER the ball at address… and STAYS there throughout the swing.

But that's NOT true.

And that’s why SO many amateurs struggle with poor contact.

Let me show you what happens in slow motion. 

As you probably know, in the golf swing, your body is rotating and relocating...

Or turning and shifting as some people say...

\[SSTS-VSL-12: show golfer turning and shifting weight backwards in the backswing (represented by one color) and then shifting their weight forward and swing up and through in the downswing and follow through (represented in another color)\]

And that means that the low point of your swing at address...

... is NOT the low point of your swing at impact. 

Look at what’s happening here... 

\[SSTS-VSL-13: Show animation of a golfer with the two colored circles around that represents the swing path. Then have a very clear line where the ball is at and arrows/words that say “bottom of the swing”\]

As you can see, the low point of your swing at address is the golf ball...

Which makes perfect sense. 

Okay... now watch what happens as the golfer starts to move off the ball...

\[SSTS-VSL-14: Now show the same animation in motion as the golfer takes the backswing... the low point (bottom of the swing should shift backwards and behind the ball)\]

Can you see how the low point of the swing is SHIFTING in the backswing?

Now watch what happens as the golfer moves through impact...

\[SSTS-VSL-15: Show slow motion animation downswing, weight shifting forward and we see the same circle and low point shifting in front of the ball. Make the Low Point or the bottom of the swing stand out and clear that the ball is behind the low point\]

The low point... or, in other words, the bottom of the swing... is shifting and moving approximately 3 inches in FRONT of the golf ball…

This is LITERALLY the 3 most important inches in golf. 

Because THAT… is the REAL low point of your swing to make consistent ball-first contact. 

And that’s why… 

No matter what anyone says…

# **\[Negative Hook\]**  {#[negative-hook]}

**Trying to hit the BALL** **at the bottom of the swing** is the REAL root cause of fat shots… thin shots… and all other mis-hits.

Because if you’re putting all your focus into hitting the BALL… 

It makes it virtually impossible to strike the ball ON THE WAY to the real low point of your swing. 

Which is why I believe… 

The single most important thing you’ll EVER learn about the golf swing… 

Is not HOW you strike the golf ball… 

But WHERE you strike the golf ball. 

## \[Negative Hook Defined\] {#[negative-hook-defined]}

Because as you already know… hitting the ball FIRST — THEN turf  — is the true secret to great contact.

But what most struggling amateurs are NEVER taught in a way that makes sense…

**… is Low Point Control.**

In other words, controlling WHERE the club hits the GROUND.   
   
And while that may sound simple... 

The reason why so many amateurs battle with low point control might surprise you.  

## \[Negative Hook Defined \- Long Test 1\] {#[negative-hook-defined---long-test-1]}

It has to do with something that’s hard-wired into the way your body works. 

To better understand this… 

Think about what happens when you brush your teeth… pick up a fork… or throw a ball.

Before you even have a chance to THINK about it…

Which hand are you using to do it? 

If you’re right-hand dominant… you probably said your right hand. 

If you’re left-hand dominant… you probably said your left. 

And that makes perfect sense. 

Because everyone has a DOMINANT side. 

And your body automatically DEFAULTS to that dominant side.  

It’s the same in your golf swing.

Duing this section, I’m thinking we have a Similar 3D animation of swing circle but showing an **amateur/beginner** golfer at address. Trail side (RIGHT SIDE) highlighted in RED. (Simple “caveman” understanding to associate lead with “good” and trail with “bad”). 

Problem is… 

When you’re trying to hit the ball at the bottom of your swing…    
   
Your dominant side overpowers your swing. 

That’s why you throw the club over the top… 

Come in steep…

Or flip your wrists at impact… 

Hitting the ground behind the ball… causing fat shots… 

Or standing up early… causing thin shots.  

Bottom line is… 

If you’re focusing on hitting the ball… 

Your **Dominant Side Default** WILL take over and rob you of the low point control to make ball-first contact. 

## \[Negative Hook Study\] {#[negative-hook-study]}

And it’s not just me saying this. 

Golf Digest’s number one coach in the world, Mark Blackburn, studied this topic in depth. 

And he found this Dominant Side Default is the biggest difference between amateurs and the best players in the world. 

Animation starts showing the LEAD side in GREEN. 

In fact, he proved that amateurs struggle to make consistent contact because they control the swing with their dominant side… in other words, their trail side. 

Pros on the other hand… control the swing with their LEAD side. 

Think about that for a second. 

\[Show a face on eye line going straight down to the ball. Then as the swing goes back have the RED box on the trail side of the golfer… and then show the player coming into impact hitting the ground before the ball\]

If you’re concentrating on hitting the ball… and your dominant trail side—which is behind the golf ball—controls the swing… 

It’s easy to see why so many players hit the ground BEFORE the ball… instead of hitting the ball… then turf.  

Now I’m no scientist… 

But Blackburn says that the ROOT cause of this difference between amateurs and pros can be explained by Newton’s Law: 

*“Force precedes motions.”*  

Which simply means… you have to FIRST apply a FORCE to create MOTION in your swing. 

The problem is…

If you’re like most amateurs who DEFAULT to applying that force with your dominant TRAIL side…

Then it’ll almost ALWAYS result in a lack of low point control…

Which is why you can’t make solid contact.  

## \[Negative Hook Examples\] {#[negative-hook-examples]}

To show you what I mean… 

Let’s look at the 3 most common Low Point Problems caused by a Dominant Side Default. 

Now, in each of these examples we’ve used cutting-edge pressure plate technology… to illustrate exactly WHERE the force is applied in these swings… 

And how it affects low point control. 

## \[Negative Hook \- Specific Proof\] \- steep, handsy \- dominant hand {#[negative-hook---specific-proof]---steep,-handsy---dominant-hand}

This first 15 handicap player struggles with a steep, over-the-top swing… 

Causing at least 3 to 5 fat shots a round. 

As you can see, at address, he’s fairly balanced on both his lead and trail side. 

Now the problem is… this golfer PULLS the club inside EARLY… 

And puts all the force into his dominate trail side. 

That’s why he gets handsy… loses the angle in the downswing… 

And hits the ground behind the ball. 

## \[Negative Hook \- Specific Proof\] \- early extension \- thin shot  {#[negative-hook---specific-proof]---early-extension---thin-shot}

Or look at this golfer.

In the takeaway, he applies pressure nicely into his trail side.   

But then, as you can see here, he too gets STUCK on his dominant side in the downswing… 

Stands up early… 

Casts the club over-the-top… 

And tries to “help” the ball up in the air… 

Which almost always results in hitting the ground BEFORE or AT the golf ball. 

## \[Negative Hook \- Specific Proof\] \- muscle it \- lateral shift \- low point chaos  {#[negative-hook---specific-proof]---muscle-it---lateral-shift---low-point-chaos}

##  

And finally… let's look at this third golfer who’s really trying to muscle it. 

From his very first move…

He’s shifted WAY too far off the ball triggering his Dominant Side Default.

Giving him NO choice but to try and MUSCLE the club with his dominant arm and hand…

Which is EXACTLY what causes his inconsistency from shot to shot. 

Sometimes he falls away onto the back foot and digs his club deep into the ground at impact… 

Other times, he flips his wrists, catching it off the toe of the club… 

And every now and again… he’ll get lucky and time it just right to hit it off the face. 

But no matter what he does… he can barely get the ball in the air… 

Because he’s NOT hitting the ball first…

And his low point is never IN FRONT of the golf ball.

This makes it virtually impossible to hit controlled iron shots with the right ball flight to stick the green.  

And that’s just THREE examples of why SO many golfers battle with low point control. 

It’s one of the most frustrating problems in golf. 

## \[Other solutions don’t work\] {#[other-solutions-don’t-work]}

And the truth is… 

It’s not your fault. 

95% of “HOW-to” instructional videos today are making it WORSE. 

Think about it… 

How many YouTube videos have you seen focused on the takeaway… or first move off the ball?

Well that’s your dominant trail side… which does NOT move the low point in front of the ball. 

Or how about trendy tips for dropping your hands in the slot...

Those TOO activate your dominant trail side and DON’T move the low point in front of the ball.

And even well-intentioned videos showing you HOW to shift your weight into your lead side… 

STILL don’t address where the REAL low point of your swing is… 

And that’s why your dominant side default takes over and you lose ALL low point control.  

Bottom line is… 

**All the best players know…** 

**It’s your LEAD side that controls the low point.**

Which is why legends like Ben Hogan only practiced “lead side” drills… 

So his dominate side wouldn't take over and rob him of low point control. 

## \[Positive Hook Setup\]  {#[positive-hook-setup]}

And it’s no different for you. 

Activating your LEAD side is critical for consistent low point control.

\[I’m thinking we show the same beginner golfer at address with an animated line drawn from their eyes down to where the real low point is. Then as they move from backswing into transition we highlight the lead side (green), and move the LOW POINT LINE in front of the ball at impact.\]   
And it’s actually a lot easier than most players think. 

Because check out what happens when you get onto your lead side — the easy way. 

It automatically moves the low point IN FRONT of the golf ball… 

Allowing you to hit the ball ON THE WAY to the real low point of the swing. 

THAT… my friend… gives you **Total Low Point Control**… to make ball-first contact on virtually EVERY shot. 

And the best part is… 

You can do this WITHOUT adding mechanical swing thoughts… 

WITHOUT trying to get into unnatural, complicated positions… 

And even WITHOUT grinding over buckets of balls… trying to fight AGAINST your swing. 

In fact, I’ve discovered a simple way for any amateur to gain total low point control… 

In no more than 10 shots on the range. 

Because fact is…

You already know golf is a game of inches. 

So just imagine what this ONE simple tweak to your low point will do for your ENTIRE golf game.

## \[Trigger Event \- Set Up\]  {#[trigger-event---set-up]}

That’s why I’ve spent the last two decades perfecting this **10-ball, simple strike sequence…**

# **\[Positive Hook\]** {#[positive-hook]}

That automatically **activates your lead side** and gives you **TOTAL low point control.**

And as soon as you start using this sequence...

You'll make solid contact... over and over... EVEN with an imperfect swing\!

How do I know?

## \[Trigger Event\] {#[trigger-event]}

Because I hosted a live, experimental group lesson...

To prove my simple 10-ball sequence works for ANY amateur struggling with contact. 

No matter their age, handicap, or what their swing looks like. 

I had over a dozen students show up...

## \[Rapport \- Just Like You\] {#[rapport---just-like-you]}

From absolute beginners... to golfers who’d been playing for decades without getting any better.

## \[Magic Wand \- Anchoring\] {#[magic-wand---anchoring]}

And I only had an hour…

So I didn't have time to work with each student one-on-one...

Which is why I showed this "simple strike sequence" to the ENTIRE **group all at once.**

## \[Trigger Event Results\] {#[trigger-event-results]}

Check out what happened...

This guy’s been playing for over 20 years...

When he came to me, he was hitting WAY behind the ball…

Chunking virtually every shot and taking a HUGE divot on the WRONG side of the golf ball.

Then, after only his 8th shot using the “simple strike sequence”...

He started flushing it straight as an arrow. 

I mean... look at this divot pattern:

That’s a sign of total low point control.

## \[Trigger Event Results\] {#[trigger-event-results]-1}

And look at this student's results...

## \[Rapport \- Just Like You\] {#[rapport---just-like-you]-1}

He’s taken over 100 hours of in-person lessons... 

## \[Negative Hook Dimensionalized\] {#[negative-hook-dimensionalized]}

But was still hitting multiple thin shots that sailed over the green every round.

He’d been told the same old story for years…

That the ONLY reason he was hitting so many thin shots… was because **he wasn’t keeping his head down.**

If I had a nickel for every time a student said they’re “trying to keep their head down”…

I’d be a very wealthy man. 

That’s why I’ve made it my mission to show every amateur this simple sequence. 

Because unlike counter-productive swing thoughts like “keep your head down”… 

This 10-ball sequence AUTOMATICALLY activates your lead side…

So you NATURALLY stay down and through the shot without having to think about it. 

That’s why… this player went from not even knowing where the real low point WAS… 

To having TOTAL low point control — in a matter of minutes.  

In fact, he said it was the FIRST TIME in his life… 

He felt like he could compress it — on command. 

All thanks to this ONE simple sequence.  

## \[Testimonial \- Trigger Event\] {#[testimonial---trigger-event]}

And while it’s great to get fast results for players who have experience... 

Here's a student who just picked up the game last year:

Needless to say…

He had NO clue what “low point” even MEANT… let alone WHERE it was in his golf swing…

Which meant the few flush shots he hit were by complete accident. 

But after performing the 10-ball simple strike sequence I’m about to show you…

He started making the type of ball-first contact that most beginners don’t experience for years. 

## \[Testimonial \- Trigger Event\] {#[testimonial---trigger-event]-1}

And THAT’s why I’m so excited to share this Simple Strike Sequence with you…

## \[Positive Hook Solves Negative Hook \+ Big Idea\] {#[positive-hook-solves-negative-hook-+-big-idea]}

Because just like the students in my group lesson… 

This sequence will activate YOUR lead side too… 

Giving you no choice but to dial in your low point control — automatically.  

## \[Benefits \- Dimensionalized \- Time \+ Plural Verb\] {#[benefits---dimensionalized---time-+-plural-verb]}

And when that happens…

Your body’s NATURAL ability to swing a club… falls into place. 

## \[Benefits \+ So You Can \+ Works Even If\] {#[benefits-+-so-you-can-+-works-even-if]}

Eliminating fat, thin, and shanked shots... after just 10 balls on the range…

EVEN if you have an imperfect swing.

This is how you go from playing AVERAGE golf… or even BAD golf... to playing GREAT golf—virtually overnight.  

## \[Benefits \- Proof\] {#[benefits---proof]}

Just like you see here... 

\[SSTS-VSL-31: This proof is on screen while he’s saying the lines below. Show back to back to back quick (5-8 clips) split videos: on the left making bad contact, on the right making flush contact. These should be 4-5 golfers back to back to back and they should have imperfect swings... but make pure, flush contact. We want to increase the energy here, leading in the big reveal\]

## \[Benefits \- Dimensionalized \- Time \+ Plural Verb \+ Taming Modifier\] {#[benefits---dimensionalized---time-+-plural-verb-+-taming-modifier]}

From poor contact... to flush contact... 

Over and over… with ONE simple change. 

## \[NLP Transition \+ Drill Tease (Add Drills to blueprint \- akin to features but different)\] {#[nlp-transition-+-drill-tease-(add-drills-to-blueprint---akin-to-features-but-different)]}

So by now, you’re probably wondering how the *simple strike sequence* works...

I’ll walk you through it right now.

## \[Drill \+ Benefit\] {#[drill-+-benefit]}

For your first 5 shots... use my “no-turn backswing” technique that lets you FEEL exactly where the club needs to be in the backswing…

\[SSTS-VSL-32: Show Martin teaching his “no-turn backswing”\]

## 

## \[Drill Objections\] {#[drill-objections]}

Without thinking about the takeaway... 

Without worrying about where your hands are at the top... 

And without having to think about any other confusing parts of the backswing. 

## \[Attainability \+ Inject Hope\] {#[attainability-+-inject-hope]}

The reason the No Turn Backswing is so effective…

Is because it automatically puts your backswing into the perfect position for consistent low point control.

Even better… it takes your dominant trail side OUT of the golf swing entirely.

## 

## \[Negative Promise \- Negative Hook\]  {#[negative-promise---negative-hook]}

And NATURALLY activates your lead side…

So you consistently hit the ball ON THE WAY to the lowest point of your swing. 

## \[Ease of use\]  {#[ease-of-use]}

## 

And the best part?

If you can chop wood… you can do the No Turn Backswing.

## \[Benefits \- JUST Do This 1 Thing\] {#[benefits---just-do-this-1-thing]}

For most players, if they ONLY do this part of the sequence... they’ll see a dramatic change in their low point control...

Eliminating fat shots... thin shots... and definitely NEVER whiffing the ball again.

And that’s already a big win...  

## \[Transition \- Lead To 2nd Drill\] {#[transition---lead-to-2nd-drill]}

But in order to make this second nature... you have to follow this sequence to a “t”... 

And that’s why the next part is so important. 

## \[Drill \+ Benefit\] {#[drill-+-benefit]-1}

Because now that the No Turn Backswing… has taken the trail side OUT of your golf swing…

You can use my “low point control drill” to bring your lead side INTO your golf swing. 

So your clubhead starts covering the ball on the way to the perfect low point…

Giving you compressed contact with SO much power that wind doesn’t affect your ball flight.  

And that’s not all…

\[Tease the thumb trick video we’ve used in ads that crushes\]

The Low Point Control Drill TRICKS your body and arms into taking 5 surgical divots in FRONT of the golf ball.

Because when you do this ONE simple “thumb trick” that’s part of this drill... 

It gets you to FEEL the leverage of your lead hand…

And effortlessly unwind the energy of the clubhead through the perfect low point — to make crisp “ball-first” contact.  

## \[Drill Objections \+ Negative Promise\] {#[drill-objections-+-negative-promise]}

And you’ll do this — without you even TRYING to hit ball first... then turf. 

## \[Drill Promises\] {#[drill-promises]}

That’s going to happen naturally when you do this part of the sequence. 

Because now that you’re not focused on “hitting the ball”...

You’ll start collecting the ball on the way down...

And nipping the ground with the total low point control needed for flush contact. 

## \[Validation Of Skepticism\] {#[validation-of-skepticism]}

And trust me… although it might feel a little strange at first...

Once your club starts hitting the ball at this perfect strike point...

EVERYTHING you’ve ever “learned” or “tried” with your golf swing will FINALLY fall into place.

## \[Promises\] {#[promises]}

And you’ll experience that addictive feeling of flushing shot after shot… 

KNOWING this is about to become your new standard. 

## \[Future Pacing \- Journey\] {#[future-pacing---journey]}

Just imagine how good it will feel… 

Going from consistently making horrible contact...

Slamming your club into the ground before the ball...

Or thinning low worm burners...

To now... finally flushing the REAL low point on repeat...

Watching your ball sail higher and farther than you ever hit it before.

It’s the best feeling in golf...

And you’re about to be able to do that… on command.

## \[Recap Big Promise Positive \+ dimensionalization\] {#[recap-big-promise-positive-+-dimensionalization]}

The “simple strike sequence” gives you the confidence to strike the perfect low point with total control — in 10 shots or less.

Meaning, you’ll be ready to take what you’ve learned… STRAIGHT onto the course...

And start competing ANY day of week… on ANY course… against virtually ANYONE you’re paired with.  

## \[Time Commitment\] {#[time-commitment]}

The sequence can be done in minutes...

But I’m not asking you to rush. 

## 

Follow the sequence step-by-step... and make every swing count. 

That’s what makes this transformation stick…

## \[Works Even If\] {#[works-even-if]}

So you can go from beginner... 

Or an experienced golfer who’s stuck right now...

... to a player who’s mastered the foundation of great golf — LOW POINT CONTROL.  

\-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

PICK UP FROM CONTROL VSL HERE (PROBABLY SIMULATOR VERSION)

# **\[Product Buildup \+ Reveal\]** {#[product-buildup-+-reveal]}

## \[Offer Introduction\] {#[offer-introduction]}

So let me show you how you can start using this *Simple Strike Sequence* for yourself RIGHT NOW.

## \[Expensive Alternatives \- Price Justification\] {#[expensive-alternatives---price-justification]}

In the past... the only way to learn it was to get 1-on-1 attention from me... like pros I’ve worked with — such as Darren Clarke or Mike Weir... 

Or to book a spot at one of my exclusive academies, which can have a waiting list of up to one year. 

## \[Rapport \- NLP Turn\] {#[rapport---nlp-turn]}

But I realize that not everyone is able to do that.

## 

And remember, as I said earlier, my mission is to help as many amateur golfers as possible go from playing embarrassingly bad golf... to confident, good golf... 

... something you can NEVER do if you’re stuck making poor contact. 

## \[Offer Genesis \- Overview\]  {#[offer-genesis---overview]}

So I decided to produce a high-end video training that not only looks good... but delivers results. 

## 

## \[Offer Genesis \- Details\] {#[offer-genesis---details]}

I took a professional film crew… to capture all the details of my Simple Strike Sequence in high-quality HD video.

The team spared no expense, using three $45,000 cameras...

Capturing multiple camera angles, and slow-motion shots…

In a way that could never be done via live workshops or in-person events.

## \[Offer Genesis \- Benefits\] {#[offer-genesis---benefits]}

So you don’t miss a single detail.

## \[Offer Details \- Overview\] {#[offer-details---overview]}

These videos walk you through, step-by-step, how to use the Simple Strike Sequence to start flushing the perfect strike point…  
\[SSTS-VSL-34: Show Martin’s old Srixon’s clubs with worn out clubface. Maybe even show Tiger’s old irons with worn out clubface\]

## \[Benefits\] {#[benefits]}

So you can confidently play good golf any time, anywhere... 

Hitting it an extra 15 to 25 yards farther...

And shooting lower scores each round — even if you’ve been battling poor contact from the moment you first picked up a club. 

# 

## \[Offer Reveal\] {#[offer-reveal]}

This **Simple Strike Sequence Video Series** has never been released publicly...

And in the next few months, it’s going to change hundreds of thousands of golfers' lives...

## \[Exclusivity\] {#[exclusivity]}

I want YOU to be one of the first... you deserve that for sticking with me today. 

## \[Offer Pitch\] {#[offer-pitch]}

So right here, right now, I'm giving you INSTANT online access to this **Simple Strike Sequence** video training program...

## \[Status\] {#[status]}

You’re going to be one of the first people to say Martin Chuck gave me the secret for flawless ball striking...

And your buddies will be begging to know what you did...

## \[Offer Delivery\] {#[offer-delivery]}

Because in less than a minute from now...

You can watch this exclusive online video training... from any computer, smartphone, or tablet...

And you can watch it at your convenience... anytime... as many times as you want…

Even while you're out on the range\!

## \[Next Best Thing\] {#[next-best-thing]}

It's like having me right there by your side... actually it’s better than having me right there...

Because I’m going to walk you through this ***Simple Strike Sequence***, step-by-step...

And I’ve covered every possible question you could have...

Questions that we would never have enough time to cover in person...

## \[Offer Objections \+ Offer Benefits\] {#[offer-objections-+-offer-benefits]}

So you won't be let down like many lessons you’ve had in the past…

Where you think you’ve figured something out… 

Then the first time you step out onto the course — you forget *everything* you learned...

And those fat, thin or mishit shots... suddenly return with a vengeance. 

With the ***Simple Strike Sequence Video Training*** that will never happen...

Because you'll always have LIFETIME access to everything... and it's just a couple clicks away.

## \[Testimonial \- Product\] {#[testimonial---product]}

Feedback on these video lessons has already started pouring in...

## 

\[SSTS-VSL-35: Testimonial: *“I’m hitting every shot at least 20 yards farther... and I’m wearing out the center of my clubface\! It’s incredible actually.”*\]

## \[Transition To Bonuses\] {#[transition-to-bonuses]}

Now, I could just give you the ***Simple Strike Sequence Video Training*** and send you on your way with the most consistently flush contact you’ve ever hit in your life... 

## \[Bonus \#1: Simple Strike Driver Series\] {#[bonus-#1:-simple-strike-driver-series]}

But as a new inner circle student, I not only want you striking your irons flush...

I ALSO want you to be dialed off the tee...

That’s why I'm adding a special bonus when you get started today...

That’s right...

## 

## \[Bonus Benefits\] {#[bonus-benefits]}

I’m including the secret to mastering the perfect strike point with your DRIVER...

... so you can add 25 to 35 more yards off the tee.

## \[Bonus Name\] {#[bonus-name]}

I call this the **Simple Strike Driver Series**.

## \[Bonus Details\] {#[bonus-details]}

This video series walks you through step-by-step how to implement the Simple Strike Sequence with the longest club in your bag.

See, after you finish hitting your first 10 shots with the Simple Strike Sequence...

## \[Bonus Benefits\] {#[bonus-benefits]-1}

You’ll be puring your irons so well... 

You’ll want to know exactly what to do with your driver.

And this series shows you exactly what to do with the NEXT 10 shots you hit on the range.  

## \[Anchor Bonus To Negative Hook\] {#[anchor-bonus-to-negative-hook]}

Because just like with the irons... 

The ball is NOT the bottom of the swing with the DRIVER either...

![][image1]  
\[SSTS-VSL-37: We want to show that the “Low Point” or the bottom of the swing is before the ball with the driver \- Again, we CANNOT use this image, we need to recreate\]

## \[Bonus Benefits\] {#[bonus-benefits]-2}

And that’s why inside this **Simple Strike Driver Series**... I’ll show you ONE simple tweak you can make to your setup...

... that will automatically have you hitting up on the ball...

... sending your drives higher and farther than you’ve ever seen before. 

I’m talking about 25 to 35 yards farther. 

![][image2]  
\[SSTS-VSL-38: Would be cool to show the driver hitting up on the ball, then cut to down the line shot so we see it going far and long\]

And that’s not all…

## \[Bonus Benefits\] {#[bonus-benefits]-3}

I’m also giving you the fastest way to fix a slice off the tee... without changing anything about the Simple Strike Sequence. 

Once you’re hitting the ball farther and MUCH straighter...

You’ll have everything you need to feel 100% confident to step out onto the course. 

## \[Bonus Value\] {#[bonus-value]}

And here’s the thing...

## 

The **Simple Strike Driver Series** will soon sell for $97 on our main website...

But today...

You’re getting it absolutely FREE...

That’s right... 

Since you’ve shown so much dedication to fixing your contact issues today...

## \[Bonus Benefits\] {#[bonus-benefits]-4}

I want to be absolutely certain you’re also making perfect contact with your driver...

Smashing the center of your club’s sweet spot, time and time again. 

## \[Bonus Transition\] {#[bonus-transition]}

And actually... I’m only just getting started...

Because like I said...

I’m fully committed to making sure that after today...

You have everything you need to end up playing the best golf of your life... and mastering ALL aspects of the game.

## \[Bonus Name \- Scratch Club\] {#[bonus-name---scratch-club]}

That’s why I’m including ANOTHER extremely valuable bonus...

A FREE 14-day "All-Access Pass" to our exclusive Scratch Club.

Scratch Club is like having your own private dream team of world-class coaches in the palm of your hand.

Imagine if any time you’re struggling with your game…

Whether that’s short game, slicing… or even the “yips”… 

You had 24/7 direct access to the best instructor in the world… to fix that specific problem.

Think about that.

Struggling to get up and down on the course?

Just log into Scratch Club on your phone… even in the middle of a round when you’re between shots…  

And you’ll find fast, actionable FIXES from James Sieckman… 

The number 1 short game instructor in the world. 

Or if you're slicing the ball… 

Log into Scratch Club and you have instant access to the sequence that Tiger’s former coach Hank Haney used to fix over 200,000 slices and counting. 

Even if you have the putting yips… 

Log into Scratch Club and go straight to Kevin Weeks’ putting course… and the top 3 putting coach in the world will erase pushes, pulls, and 3-putts from your game.

All that and more is inside Scratch Club. 

Over 185,000 amateurs use this platform to fix every area of their game.

On average, golfers who use Scratch Club drop 5 strokes from their handicap in the first month alone.

Because improvement is inevitable when you have direct-access to world-class players and coaches who are otherwise impossible to work with. 

Beyond the legends already mentioned, this also includes 6-time Major champion… Sir Nick Faldo… 

Hall of Famer David Leadbetter – who’s given over 150,000 lessons in his 50-year career and contributed to 23 major wins… 

Jack Nicklaus’ and Phil Mickelson’s former coach, Rick Smith… 

Dr. Deborah Graham... a Golf Digest top 5 sports psychologist who’s trained more than 400 tour pros like Freddie Couples and Lee Janzen...

Eric Cogorno... who’s given over 50,000 lessons and is recognized as one of the best online instructors in golf… 

Plus more training from me\!

Like I said… this is your own private dream team of instructors at your fingertips. 

So if you’re serious about having the biggest advantage over everyone you play with…

And you want to drop your handicap THIS YEAR… 

Then check out what Scratch Club is already doing for players just like you: 

And I think you’ll love this part most.

You get to take a full 14 days to see how quickly Scratch Club can improve your game… and give you full confidence to play your best golf. 

If you love it, then do nothing and we’ll keep you on for a discounted price of just $29 per month, which will bill automatically.

You can cancel anytime by emailing support@performancegolf.com.

And no matter what you decide…

You’ll keep your lifetime access to your Simple Strike Sequence video Training and all the bonuses you’re getting today.

And while I’m incredibly proud of all the world-class video training we’ve put together for you… 

The ONE thing I love even more — is LIVE coaching sessions. 

That’s why, when you join us TODAY, on this page only… 

## \[Bonus Name\] {#[bonus-name]-1}

You're also unlocking exclusive access to a ***LIVESTREAM Simple Strike Training Academy with Me...***

That’s right...

You’re not done with me after today...

Because I’m holding this LIVESTREAM Academy-Style Bonus Lesson... to be 100% sure you’ve implemented the Simple Strike Sequence correctly...

... just like those who were with me in person. 

This is worth far more than the price I’m going to ask you to invest in the entire program...

Because you'll be able to ask me *any* follow-up questions you want... as we work together to fix or tweak anything — and help you master the *10-shot sequence* taught in my ***Simple Strike Sequence Video Series***... 

... while also providing the confidence-boosting validation that you HAVE indeed cured your poor contact for good. 

Because if there’s one thing I refuse to accept, it’s mediocre results...

That’s also why...

I won't just be *TELLING* you the answers on the LIVE Training Academy...

I'll be SHOWING you anything I reveal, streaming LIVE, over your computer or cell phone.

You’ll get details as soon as you enroll in the ***Simple Strike Sequence***...

And you might be thinking...

*“Well, Martin, what if I can’t make it to the LIVE session?”*

I’m glad you asked...

Because there will be a replay if you can't make it... 

And since most people have similar questions and challenges when it comes to their contact... 

Even if you can’t make it LIVE — I’m 99% sure your question or issue will have been asked and answered on the replay... 

I would normally charge $300 for a LIVE stream...

But today — when you get started with the **Simple Strike Sequence** — it’s yours FREE**...**

That’s one full hour (or more) to ask me any questions about your game — LIVE.

But that’s not all…

## \[Bonus Name\] {#[bonus-name]-2}

Because as much as I like to LIVESTREAM… the one thing I LOVE even more is being able to help you 1-on-1 at my Tour Striker Academies.

That’s why I’m really excited to give you this next bonus…

Because when you say YES to the Simple Strike Sequence today…

You’ll automatically be submitted into our drawing for the IN PERSON Tour Striker Experience…

That’s right, you have a chance to win an ALL EXPENSES PAID trip to Arizona… where you’ll join me for a 3 day LIVE Tour Striker Academy. 

That means you get to WORK with me and my incredible team IN PERSON… and we can take your ball striking… distance… and accuracy… to ANOTHER level. 

In just 3 days of working with me LIVE IN PERSON… I’ll give you more of my secret weapons for playing your best golf that will NEVER be released publicly… 

And it won’t cost you ANYTHING\!

All you have to do is… once you’ve completed the Simple Strike Sequence and you’re making the most pure contact of your life…

Just send a video testimonial to martin@performancegolf.com… and you’ll be in the running…

Then, twice each year… we’ll pick a student to hop a plane and come see me here at the Raven Golf and Country Club.

And as if that weren’t enough…

I’ve got ONE more bonus to assure you investing in the Simple Strike Sequence is an easy decision.  

## \[Bonus Name \- Confidential Guide\] {#[bonus-name---confidential-guide]}

You’re ALSO getting The Confidential Guide To Ball-Striking Equipment.

When I say “confidential”... I mean it.

We’ve used our inside connections to secure special discount pricing AND over $1,000 of coupons, exclusively for new Simple Strike students ONLY.

You must agree not to share the contents of this guide with ANYONE.

See, after using the Simple Strike Sequence… you’re going to be flushing the ball so well...

That you may end up like many of my other students...

Asking “Martin, how do I get the best equipment to improve my game even more?”

I can’t tell you how many times I hear this.

And rightfully so... because a lot of players I see at golf camps DON’T use the right tools for the job.

And right now… if you’re using big-name clubs designed for Tour pros…

You’re easily losing 3 to 5 strokes a round… or more.

You see, everyone thinks golf is an expensive game... 

But what makes golf costly on and off the course… is buying the WRONG equipment.

Mismatched clubs... unproven training aids... glitchy technology... it’s endless. 

But buying the right equipment for YOU... doesn’t have to be expensive… or complicated.

That’s why I created The Confidential Guide To Ball-Striking Equipment. 

It’s based on years of research and student surveys, who’ve helped us pick the BEST PERFORMING gear for amateurs. 

Want to know the right set of clubs for you? 

Or the best training aid? 

Or even the right shoes? 

It's all in here.

This means you’ll save thousands of dollars by avoiding bad purchases…

AND you get over $1,000 in exclusive discounts normally reserved for the pros…

Which means this is literally worth WAY more than your entire investment in the program.

And again, you won’t pay a single penny for The Confidential Guide To Ball-Striking Equipment... because it’s yours, absolutely free when you join us today. 

These bonuses and discounts are only available on this page, for a very limited time. 

So you’re not going to want to miss this... 

## \[Offer Recap \+ Offer Value\] {#[offer-recap-+-offer-value]}

Because you’re getting…

***The Simple Strike Sequence Video Training... that eliminates fat shots, thin shots, and mis-hits in just 10 practice shots...***

***The Simple Strike Driving Series... that increases your distance off the tee by 25 to 35 yards...***  
\[$97.00 value FREE\]

\[$97.00 value FREE\]

\[$300.00 value FREE\]

\[Priceless\]

***And The Confidential Guide To Ball Striking Equipment... with coupons worth over $1,000...***  
\[$250.00 value FREE\]

That’s $744 worth of bonuses you’re getting absolutely FREE... when you invest in the **Simple Strike Sequence Video Training** today.

## \[Offer Questions\] {#[offer-questions]}

And it’s not going to cost you anywhere near what you may think.

## \[Expensive Alternatives \- Price Justification\] {#[expensive-alternatives---price-justification]-1}

You see, I have students who fly in from all over the world to participate in my Tour Striker Golf Academies...

These students are paying at least $5,500 — to learn exactly what I’m going to teach you just moments from now...

When you factor in travel expenses and hotel costs... 

Well, let’s just say they are paying a small fortune to work with me in-person...

And while I’ve been very lucky to have created one of the top golf academies in the world — one that’s booked solid at a premium price...

Plus, those rates don’t help me reach the majority of golfers out there who are struggling with contact issues…

## \[Price Dropdown\] {#[price-dropdown]}

Plus all the bonuses.

You could watch the training today...

Head to the range this afternoon...

Hit the 10 shots required in this sequence... and immediately make the purest, most flush contact of your entire life... 

## \[Offer Benefits\] {#[offer-benefits]}

And it won't just be once... you’ll hit shot after shot.... 

Perfectly flush... over and over with ultimate consistency...

## \[Rhetorical \- Big Promise Recap\] {#[rhetorical---big-promise-recap]}

Why?

Because you'll have used the **Simple Strike Sequence** to eliminate your poor contact once and for all...

## \[Guarantee\] {#[guarantee]}

And if you’re still thinking...

*"What if this doesn't work for me?"*

Well, first of all, if that happens you’ll be an outlier... 

But in the extremely unlikely event that occurs... 

... know that you’re also getting a 365-Day, Flush It Or It's Free, 100% Money Back Guarantee...

PLUS, our unconditional refund policy.

That means you can try this out completely risk-free... and take up to an entire YEAR to decide how much you love it.

This is the most generous unconditional guarantee in the entire industry... so there's absolutely zero risk to you.

When you click the button below to get started today...

If you're not completely happy with how you’re puring the ball with both your irons and driver...

With the extra distance you've gained...

And with how much more fun you're having playing the game of golf...

Then we'll give you every single penny of your money back.

All you have to do is send us an email any time within the next YEAR to support@performancegolf.com...

And our friendly customer success team will send you a payment for 100% of the amount you paid for the program\!

But I don’t expect that to happen...

Because players are already using the Simple Strike Sequence to make the purest contact of their lives...

... and their handicaps are dropping like flies.

## \[Urgency \+ Scarcity\] {#[urgency-+-scarcity]}

So if you want to be just like these golfers... then take advantage of this huge discount pricing, and this 365-day no-risk money-back guarantee...

And act now.

Because I'm only offering this special discount pricing for a limited time.

If you come back to this presentation tomorrow, or next week, there's a very real chance you'll be asked to pay the full $197 listed on our main website.

## \[CTA\] {#[cta]-1}

So click the button below this video, and take advantage of this deal before it's too late.

## \[Crossroads Close\] {#[crossroads-close]}

Because right now you have a decision to make that will have a permanent effect on your golf game.

Like I said before, and I’ll say once more... contact is EVERYTHING in golf. 

Without the ability to make solid contact, nothing else matters... and the game will never be fun. 

So when you think about it, you really only have 2 options.

## \[Crossroads Close \- Option 1\] {#[crossroads-close---option-1]}

You already know what happens when you choose the first option and do nothing... 

Your contact — and ability to play respectable golf — will be in exactly the same place 6 months from now... 

And I don’t want that for you...

So given that there’s zero risk to you... doesn’t it make sense to at least *TRY* this **Simple Strike Sequence?** 

This same training has worked in my 1,000 plus academies — and it’s changed the golfing lives of over 10s of thousands students who I’ve worked with over the years…

## \[Benefits \- Before After\] {#[benefits---before-after]}

Because when you invest in the **Simple Strike Sequence**... 

... even if you consider yourself a terrible golfer...

You’ll immediately go from wherever you are now...

To a respectably good... or even great golfer... who can finish holes and entire rounds confidently... 

## \[Dimensionalization\] {#[dimensionalization]}

Play with groups that previously would have terrified you... 

And maybe even start taking money off your buddies... 

... who’ve told you to “get some lessons before you’re ready to tee it up with us”. 

Because guys, this is the first — and LAST — ball-striking lesson you’ll ever need... 

After today, you’ll be a golfer completely in control of your game... 

You’ll be completely addicted to that sound of pure contact... 

While hitting it more accurately (and farther) than you ever thought possible... 

## \[Crossroads Close \- Option 2\] {#[crossroads-close---option-2]}

And that brings us to the second option, which really makes the most sense...

Because when you join me inside the **Simple Strike Sequence Video Training**... 

It saves you months or even years of suffering (and still getting nowhere)... 

Plus it allows ME to take all the risk for you...

With my 365-Day, Flush It Or It's Free, 100% Money Back Guarantee.

So to get started with option two, your next action is simple:

Click the button below and complete the secure checkout page to get access to the entire training series, so you can use the **Simple Strike Sequence** for immediate results.

Watch the videos... head over to your local driving range...  follow the sequence...

And watch what happens\!

Do all that knowing it’s your one and only completely RISK-FREE opportunity to eliminate poor contact for good... 

## \[Future Pacing\] {#[future-pacing]}

Think about it... 

I’m asking you to spend 10 shots to finally start making perfectly flush contact...

Using the most proven ball striking sequence ever developed...

And when you use the Simple Strike Sequence...

Watch how long it takes before that rush of confidence starts flowing through you...

The type of confidence where you can swing as hard as you want...

Because you know that mishits, including fat shots... thin shots... and even outright whiffs...

... have been ejected from your bag...

You are no longer a struggling golfer stuck on the range...

You’re now making solid contact on every shot... 

You're no longer taking mulligans or having to pick up because it gets so bad...

You’re now flushing dollar bill divots that send your ball directly on target...

Hitting more greens in regulation...

And shooting the scores you’ve always dreamed of. 

With your contact dialed in...

You’ll have everything you need to start playing GREAT GOLF\!

And you know what’s more fun than great golf?

You guessed it...

NOTHING.
